# MuleSoft MuleSoft Inference Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of MuleSoft Inference Connector documentation.
> See [MuleSoft Inference Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-inference-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the MuleSoft Inference Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring Image Generation Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-inference-connector/latest/configuring-image-generation-operations.md)
- [Configuring Moderation Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-inference-connector/latest/configuring-moderation-operations.md)
- [Configuring Text Generation Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-inference-connector/latest/configuring-text-generation-operations.md)
- [Configuring Vision Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-inference-connector/latest/configuring-vision-operations.md)
